trans-unit.source: No running apphost found. Use 'aspire run' to start one first.
trans-unit.target: 找不到正在執行的 apphost。請先使用 'aspire run' 啟動一個。

trans-unit.source: Output format for detached apphost results
trans-unit.target: 中斷連接 apphost 結果的輸出格式

trans-unit.source: Run in isolated mode with randomized ports and isolated user secrets, allowing multiple instances to run simultaneously
trans-unit.target: 在隔離模式中搭配隨機化連接埠和隔離的使用者袐密執行，允許同時執行多個執行個體

trans-unit.source: Multiple running apphosts found in the current directory. Select from running apphosts.
trans-unit.target: 目前目錄中找到多個正在執行的 apphost。請從正在執行的 apphost 中選取。

trans-unit.source: No running apphosts found in the current directory. Select from all running apphosts.
trans-unit.target: 目前目錄中找不到正在執行的 apphost。請從所有正在執行的 apphost 中選取。

trans-unit.source: The path to the Aspire apphost project file
trans-unit.target: Aspire apphost 專案檔案的路徑

trans-unit.source: The environment to use for the operation. The default is 'Production'.
trans-unit.target: 用於執行作業的環境。預設為「實際執行」。

trans-unit.source: Include exception details (stack traces) in pipeline logs
trans-unit.target: 在管線記錄中包含例外狀況詳細資料 (堆疊追蹤)

trans-unit.source: Set the minimum log level for pipeline logging (trace, debug, information, warning, error, critical). The default is 'information'.
trans-unit.target: 設定管線記錄的最低記錄層級 (追蹤、偵錯、資訊、警告、錯誤、危及)。預設為「資訊」。
正在掃描執行中的 apphost...

trans-unit.source: Would you like to configure AI agent environments for this project?
trans-unit.target: 您想為此專案設定 AI 代理程式環境嗎?
